definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at det kommer noe i tillegg til det nevnte (som er minst like vesentlig, sjokkerende eller lignende)
definitions.translation: used to express that something is added to what has been mentioned (which is at least as significant, shocking)

examples.no: ikke nok med at han lyver, han stjeler også
examples.en: not only does he lie, he also steals
